subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Hearst, spoken on 1912-10-16
subcodes.first_line: The Cause of God is sanctified from all political power and worldly affairs.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امر الله از قوای ملکی و امور دنیوی مقدس است و از جمله تعالیم الهیه بنفوس امانت و انقطاع و تقدیس است
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @greed; envy; covetousness; attachment to the world, @non-participation in politics, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
